% Map every non-ASCII character that appears anywhere in WHITEPAPER.md to a
% pdflatex-renderable form. inputenc-utf8 only declares a subset; the rest
% must be explicit. Generated by inspecting the source — keep in sync.
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{00A7}{\S}                       % § section sign
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{00A9}{\textcopyright}           % © copyright
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{00B7}{\textperiodcentered}      % · middle dot
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2013}{--}                       % – en dash
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2014}{---}                      % — em dash
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2192}{$\rightarrow$}            % → rightwards arrow
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2500}{-}                        % ─ box drawing horizontal
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2502}{|}                        % │ box drawing vertical
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{250C}{+}                        % ┌ down-and-right
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2510}{+}                        % ┐ down-and-left
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2514}{+}                        % └ up-and-right
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2518}{+}                        % ┘ up-and-left
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{251C}{+}                        % ├ vertical-and-right
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2524}{+}                        % ┤ vertical-and-left
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{252C}{+}                        % ┬ horizontal-and-down
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2534}{+}                        % ┴ horizontal-and-up
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{253C}{+}                        % ┼ cross
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{25BC}{$\blacktriangledown$}     % ▼ down triangle
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{25C4}{$\blacktriangleleft$}     % ◄ left pointer
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{25CB}{$\circ$}                  % ○ white circle
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2713}{$\checkmark$}             % ✓ check mark
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2717}{$\times$}                 % ✗ ballot x
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2022}{\textbullet}              % • bullet

% Make verbatim blocks tolerate UTF-8 (the listings/code-block path).
\usepackage{fancyvrb}
\fvset{commandchars=\\\{\}}

% Tighten the layout a little so the paper reads less like a draft.
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist[itemize]{topsep=2pt,itemsep=0pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{topsep=2pt,itemsep=0pt}
